# Superachiever

> A Superachiever is one member of Supercivilization — a person with their own async single-family office (SFO), creating their success puzzle at their own pace, for member benefits. Participate privately for member benefits — and build in public to whatever degree you choose.

## The four — the SFO's components

- Superpowers — the harness: the loop made runnable (agents, tools, systems). Everything delegable.
- Personal Success Puzzle — health & energy, wealth & career, peace & people. The family side of a family office.
- Business Success Puzzle — front-stage users, back-stage admin, bottom-line profit. The office side of a family office.
- Supermind — the mind that runs the harness, holding Current and Desired; the loop: Current → Desired → Actions → Results (starting, focusing, finishing). Two moments always belong to the member: set the Desired, authorize the Actions.

(Superpowers and Supermind are distinct components that share one publication stream: Supermind Superpowers, Saturdays.)

What separates an achiever from a superachiever is completing the loop — starting, focusing, and finishing.

## Related

- The organization: [Supercivilization](https://supercivilization.xyz) — subscribe for first notice; founding membership opens 2026.
- The alliance of members: [Superachievers](https://superachievers.xyz) — the sync multi-family office.
- Offices are built and run through [Avolve](https://avolve.io) — the agentic virtual family office.
- Founder: [Joshua Seymour](https://joshuaseymour.com)
